docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF APR-03-2026 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY LIEM, STEVE AS TO DEFENDANT WU, XIUJUAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-07-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT WU, XIUJUAN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2026 - CONTINUED FOR CANTONESE INTERPRETER TO APR-03-2026 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF STEVE LIEM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT XIUJUAN WU IS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT TOLD THE COURTROOM CLERK HER LAST NAME IS WU, NOT XIUJUAN. PROOF OF SERVICE IS ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR CANTONESE INTERPRETER
